abstract: Complete print design specifications for business collateral including exact dimensions with bleed and safe margins, DPI requirements (300 minimum), CMYK color mode guidance with hex-to-CMYK reference table, font embedding and outlining requirements, file format standards (PDF/X-1a preferred), paper stock recommendations, and comprehensive handoff checklists. Covers business cards, letterhead, envelopes, flyers, brochures (tri-fold and bi-fold), postcards, posters, banners, and table tents. Includes 10 common pitfalls and corrective measures.
